articles.title: From non-league to the World Cup - the Semenyo story
articles.summary: Winger Antoine Semenyo's football journey began in the English lower leagues. BBC Sport charts his rise from Bath City to the World Cup, with Ghana poised to face England.

articles.title: Norway win five-goal thriller against Senegal to make last 32
articles.summary: Erling Haaland scores twice as Norway book their place in the last 32 of the World Cup with a 3-2 victory over Senegal in New Jersey.

articles.title: What France & Iraq did during 'mentally draining' two-hour weather delay
articles.summary: France's World Cup match against Iraq was delayed for two hours because of the weather. BBC Sport look at how the sides dealt with it.

articles.title: France weather storm to beat Iraq and sail into knockouts
articles.summary: Kylian Mbappe marks his 100th international cap for France with two goals in a 3-0 win over Iraq which seals' Les Bleus place in the last 32, after a two-hour storm delay.

articles.title: From retirement to records - another immortal Messi moment
articles.summary: Ten years after announcing he was quitting international football, Lionel Messi is still breaking records for reigning World Cup champions Argentina.

articles.title: Messi makes World Cup history as Argentina reach last 32
articles.summary: Lionel Messi becomes the World Cup's all-time leading goalscorer as his double against Austria sends holders Argentina into the last 32.

articles.title: 'Brilliant finish' - Messi becomes all-time leading World Cup scorer
articles.summary: Lionel Messi makes history as the all-time leading World Cup scorer, netting his 17th tournament goal during Argentina's game against Austria.

articles.title: All of Messi's record-breaking 18 World Cup goals
articles.summary: Watch all of Lionel Messi's World Cup goals as he breaks Miroslav Klose's individual scoring record with a 17th goal in Argentina's group stage match against Austria.

articles.title: 'He is human' - Messi misses from the spot as he chases scoring record
articles.summary: Lionel Messi badly misses a penalty against Austria that would have made him the all-time World Cup record goalscorer.

articles.title: Messi adds another goal to his collection after breaking record
articles.summary: After becoming the World Cup's all-time leading goalscorer earlier in the game, Lionel Messi adds an 18th goal to his collection as he puts Argentina 2-0 up against Austria.

articles.title: Salah scores to help Egypt to first World Cup win
articles.summary: Mohamed Salah scores one goal and creates another as Egypt come from behind to beat New Zealand and secure their first-ever World Cup win.

articles.title: Why do some World Cup shirts keep tearing during matches?
articles.summary: Puma shirts have torn four times during the World Cup so far, so what exactly is going on?

articles.title: Cape Verde fan goes wild live on BBC News as his country scores
articles.summary: During a live BBC News broadcast, reporter Paul Njie interviews a Cape Verde fan when the country suddenly scores its first ever World Cup goal against Uruguay in the 2026 World Cup.
